note: OTC safety hardening + V13 banner update. Web + docs only. ZERO consensus / scripts / src changes. Non-custodial model preserved (no escrow, no dispute, no badges). (A) sost-otc.html cyan callout extended with three tactical rules: (1) screenshots-not-proof, (2) verify-bank-wallet-directly-not-SMS, (3) chargeback-risk per payment method (PayPal F&F 180d, SEPA / instant 8w, Wise instant, cash, on-chain stablecoin). New scammer-vs-honest two-column section after the callout (8 rows each). (B) sost-talk.html OTC safety banner extended with the same screenshot-not-proof + chargeback rules. New Pre-Trade Safety Checklist modal shown the first time a user opens the otc room (6 checklist items, localStorage flag sost_otc_safety_acknowledged_v1, no cookies, no third-party storage). renderRoomTabs hook calls maybeShowOtcChecklist on every room change. (C) website/js/sost-sentinel.js SCAM_PATTERNS extended with 5 common OTC pressure patterns: release-first / send-first / I'll send after; order-expiring / hurry-up / release-fast; move-to-telegram / DM-me; I-sent-the-screenshot; trust-me / I'm-verified / I'm-an-admin / I-work-with-SOST. (D) docs/SOST_TALK_COMMUNITY_RULES.md appended new OTC / P2P Tactical Safety Rules section with the three rules, scammer-vs-honest table, pre-trade checklist, and the Sentinel pattern list. (E) sost-explorer.html V13 banner Community OTC / P2P Board box extended with the three tactical safety rules + mention of the pre-trade checklist modal + Sentinel auto-flag patterns. NOT IMPLEMENTED by design (deferred): anti-phishing personal phrase and reputation thread. NOT IMPLEMENTED by policy (would break non-custodial model): escrow, verified-merchant badges, dispute resolution, insurance fund.
